form.formComment: At debut, 2nd in a small field at Tauherenikau on March 22 over 1000m, slow going 1.3 len behind Spark carrying 58kg at $9.30. Can progress and take this out.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Gelding by Bivouac on debut. Has looked handy in two trials leading into this. Was runner-up in a trial at Taupo on March 17 over 900m. Don't rule him out.

form.formComment: Third race start. First start 6th of 10 at New Plymouth Raceway on November 21 over 1200m, slow going 3 len behind Laura's Legacy carrying 57.5kg at $9.60. Went for a spell before returning 5th of 8 at Hawera on March 25 over 1200m, 4 len behind Marie Antoinette with 58kg at $6.10. Strips fitter and expected to feature.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Three-year-old gelding (Tassort - Rhiannon). He has three recent trials prior to his debut today. Won his most recent trial at Avondale over 800m on March 24. Any market support will add to the confidence.

form.formComment: Having third race start. At debut, 6th of 8 at this track on February 22 over 1200m, on a slow track; 3 len behind London with 57.5kg at $20.40. Second-up 6th of 8 at Waverley on March 18 over 1400m, 3 len behind Trafalgar with 57.5kg at $23. Looks tested without big improvement.

form.formComment: On debut. Three-year-old gelding by Nadeem out of Ruby Love. At the most recent trial finished seventh at Foxton over 1000m. Trial form not inspiring any confidence.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Last start tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 8 at Waverley on March 18 over 1400m, 2 len behind Carter John carrying 56kg at $5.30. Before that raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 9 at this track on February 22 over 1360m, slow going 1.3 len behind Silent Applause carrying 56kg at $2.10. Nicely placed and expected to go a lot better.

Last start tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 10 at Tauherenikau on March 22 over 1400m, slow going 2.75 len behind The Explosive carrying 56kg at $6.10. Progressing well and is one of the major hopes.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Resuming. Finished off last campaign sixth of 8 at Hawera July 15 over 1200m, in the wet; 19 len behind Spandeedo with 54kg at $23.60. First up last campaign fourth of 10 at this track May 31 over 1200m, on rain affected going; 2.5 len behind Platinum Diamond with 54kg at $14.50. Prefer to see how she returns.
